_setup_instructions.typecheck_command: Command that exits non-zero when types break. Default works for most repos; override for monorepos (e.g., `pnpm -r typecheck`).
_setup_instructions.lint_command: Command that exits non-zero when lint fails. Use `:` (no-op) if the repo has no lint script.
_setup_instructions.package_manager: One of: npm, pnpm, yarn, bun. Used to detect Zod/typescript availability.
_setup_instructions.min_node_version: Minimum Node version your codemods will run under. jscodeshift needs ≥18.
_setup_instructions.include_globs: File patterns to scan. Restrict to source directories for big monorepos.
_setup_instructions.exclude_globs: Patterns to skip. Always include node_modules and build output dirs.
_setup_instructions.scan_max_age_minutes: How fresh scan.json must be before apply.sh will run. Lower for fast-moving branches.
